follow_ups.title: Run act phase for bug-squash-167 — 7 tasks queued
follow_ups.description: The act phase was not executed. All 7 pipeline friction bug fixes remain unimplemented. Run `datum act` to dispatch lanes.

follow_ups.title: CORR-001: Add missing AC1-AC5 RED skeletons to tests/test_ruff_precheck.py
follow_ups.description: Preflight packet recorded skeleton_written=True for all 6 ACs but only AC6 skeleton is present. AC1-AC5 test functions are absent. RED agent self-check will count 1 vs expected 6.

follow_ups.title: CORR-002: Add missing AC1-AC5 RED skeletons to tests/test_mypy_precheck.py
follow_ups.description: Same as CORR-001 for the mypy test file. 5 of 6 required RED skeletons are absent despite preflight logging skeleton_written=True.

follow_ups.title: ARCH-001: Fix traceability comment in tests/test_mypy_precheck.py:3 to use underscore name
follow_ups.description: Traceability comment references hyphenated function name that doesn't match the actual function definition. Tooling that parses traceability comments will find no match.

follow_ups.title: ARCH-002: Fix traceability comment in tests/test_ruff_precheck.py:3 to use underscore name
follow_ups.description: Same mismatch as ARCH-001 in the ruff test file.

follow_ups.title: ARCH-003: Add language-aware identifier sanitization to skeleton_creator.py:make_function_name()
follow_ups.description: make_function_name() at line 337 applies slugify() without post-processing for language-specific identifier rules. Python/Go/Swift/TS cannot have hyphens in function names. Add hyphen-to-underscore conversion for these languages.

follow_ups.title: ARCH-004: Add existence check before write_text() in skeleton_creator.py:467 (root cause of bug #160)
follow_ups.description: dest.write_text() at line 467 silently overwrites existing test files. When multiple lanes share a test file, each lane nukes the previous lane's tests. Must check if dest exists and append new test methods rather than overwrite.

follow_ups.title: ARCH-005: Enforce file-to-lane exclusivity at plan-decompose time, not skeleton layer
follow_ups.description: Bug #163 (same impl file assigned to multiple lanes) must be fixed in lane-plan generation. The skeleton layer is too late — conflicts need exclusive assignment or sequential dependency edges added when lane-plan.json is written.

follow_ups.title: CORR-003: Fix legacy hyphenated traceability comment in tests/test_ruff_precheck.py:3
follow_ups.description: Traceability comment still uses pre-fix hyphenated identifier (bug #161 residue). Update to match the actual underscore function name.

follow_ups.title: CORR-004: Fix legacy hyphenated traceability comment in tests/test_mypy_precheck.py:3
follow_ups.description: Same residual bug #161 pattern as CORR-003 in the mypy test file.

follow_ups.title: CORR-005: Complete truncated docstring in tests/test_ruff_precheck.py:9
follow_ups.description: Docstring reads '...runRuffCheck returns { passed: true' but full AC text is '...runRuffCheck returns { passed: true, errors: [] }'. Missing ', errors: [] }' may cause RED agent to implement only the passed field.

follow_ups.title: Add post-skeleton write verification: count committed test functions vs AC count
follow_ups.description: The preflight packet logged skeleton_written=True for all 6 ACs but only 1 skeleton was committed. The pipeline must verify actual test function count in the committed file matches the expected AC count before advancing past RED setup.
